name: NON INVASIVE MONITORING SYSTEMS INC /FL/
business: The company was previously engaged in the development, manufacture and marketing of non-invasive, whole body periodic acceleration (WBPA) therapeutic platforms. The company discontinued operations in May 2019 and is currently assessing potential mergers and acquisitions.

exposures.sentence: We previously were engaged in the development, manufacture and marketing of non-invasive, whole body periodic acceleration ( WBPA ) therapeutic platforms, which are motorized platforms that move a subject repetitively head to foot.
